## Summary

Briefly describe your proposal.

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve?

## Proposed solution

Describe your proposed solution.

## Alternatives considered

Describe any alternative approaches you have considered.

## Compatibility

Will this proposal affect:

- [ ] Consensus
- [ ] Network protocol
- [ ] Wallet compatibility
- [ ] Mining
- [ ] RPC interface
- [ ] GUI only
- [ ] Documentation only

If yes, please explain.

## Additional context

Include any additional information, examples, references, or screenshots that may help explain the proposal.
